name: ml-feature-evaluator
description: Structured go/no-go evaluation for adding a new feature or data source to a production ML model. Runs a 10-step diagnostic (data quality pre-check, distribution, outcome gradient with leakage ceiling, bucket decomposition, coverage gaps, entropy with gain ratio, conditional mutual information, incremental CV AUC), 9-point temporal safety checklist, and produces a decision-backed implementation plan with monitoring spec.
